MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Jeff McCork
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Cristian Rene Pocasanbre is present.
Attorney Carri Maas representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of July-30-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
